## Summary

Brief description of the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`)
- [ ] Frontend lint passes if `frontend/` changed (`cd frontend && npm run lint`)
- [ ] Docs updated (if API, deploy, or architecture changed)
- [ ] No secrets committed (no `.env*`, API keys, or personal `books.csv`)
- [ ] Follows project style (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] CI green (Tests + Frontend CI when applicable)
